channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Boost Your Job Search Skills
item.description: Stand out in the job market with these free courses from LinkedIn Learning.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Cloud edge sovrano: i progetti dell’Europa e le aspettative dei CIO
item.description: Il cloud sovrano non è più soltanto un obiettivo della Commissione Europea, ma è anche un desiderio espresso per molti CIO, soprattutto nella Pubblica Amministrazione e nelle aziende che gestiscono dati sensibili.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: SEC to abandon plan for crypto firms to register as trading systems
item.description: The acting chief of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission said on Monday he has directed staff to look at ways to abandon a plan that would have widened the definition of alternative trading systems to include some cryptocurrency firms.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Lawmakers urge Trump administration to cancel owl-killing plan, say it would cost too much
item.description: A bipartisan group of lawmakers urge the Trump administration to scrap plans to kill more than 450,000 invasive barred owls in West Coast forests in coming decades.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Brown, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nissan is testing driverless vehicles in city streets
item.description: The van makes its way slowly but surely through the city streets, braking gently when a car swerves into its lane. But its steering wheel is turning on its own, and there’s no one in the driver’s seat. The driverless technology from Nissan Motor Corp.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: IBM wins UK lawsuit against LzLabs for mainframe intellectual property theft
item.description: When it comes to protecting its mainframe technology, IBM wields a pretty big sword. This week, its defense triumphed as IBM won a judgement against LzLabs for violating Big Blue’s intellectual property rights.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Musk outlines DOGE work in rare TV interview
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk offered new details about the work of President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) on Monday, while doubling down on the group’s efforts amid mounting criticism.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Lego just celebrated Mario Day in the best way possible, with an incredible Mario Kart set that's up for preorder now
item.description: The just-announced Lego Mario Kart – Mario & Standard Kart set will let you build a larger-than-life Mario and his iconic kart from the video game.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: AI made its way to vineyards. Here’s how the technology is helping make your wine
item.description: Experts say that the wine industry is proof that businesses can integrate the technology efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Tesla's EV sales are plummeting – as used Model Y and Model 3 prices crash to bargain levels
item.description: Tesla's new car sales are dropping, but prices are also falling on the used car market as buyers look beyond Musk for electric vehicles.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Dyson vacuums have one big problem and I don't understand why
item.description: Dyson needs to fix this basic usability issue across its full range, not just the most expensive model.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tesla shares plummet as Wall Street rethinks sales projections
item.description: Tesla Inc. shares are on track for their steepest drop since 2020 as Wall Street analysts begin to slash their estimates for vehicle deliveries.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: I tried out a bunch of the AI assistants. Here’s what you need to know about each one
item.description: Does it feel to you like there are way too many AI assistants to keep track of? Between ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, DeepSeek, and others, it’s hard to remember what each one excels at—if anything.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: OPM inspector general investigating DOGE emails, access to agency data
item.description: The inspector general for the Office of Personnel Management (OPM) told lawmakers he is investigating the use of a new data system at the agency that has been part of a broader effort by Elon Musk and his allies to email federal workers.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk is claiming that the social media platform is being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.
item.dc:creator: Michelle Chapman And Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Elon Musk says X outages caused by cyberattack
item.description: Musk hypothesized on his platform that "Either a large, coordinated group and/or a country" were responsible.
item.dc:creator: Ashley N. Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: La frustración con TI cuesta a las empresas más de 100 millones de dólares al año
item.description: Según un nuevo estudio, de media, la gran empresa perdió 104 millones de dólares por ineficiencias digitales en 2024, impulsadas por pérdidas de productividad relacionadas con las frustraciones de los empleados con las TI y cientos de aplicaciones fantasma que pasan desapercibidas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Building generative AI? Get ready for generative UI
item.description: There’s currently no stopping generative AI spending. Analyst firm Omdia expects spending on generative AI applications to hit $58 billion by 2028. Yet while this level of investment is a significant amount, actual deployment of generative AI applications is still slow.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: They were forced to scam others worldwide. Now thousands are detained on the Myanmar border
item.description: Thousands of sick, exhausted and terrified young men and women, from countries all over the world squat in rows, packed shoulder to shoulder, surgical masks covering their mouths and, some, their eyes.
item.dc:creator: Huizhong Wu, Jintamas Saksornchai And Martha Mendoza, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New delivery robot can haul 2,200 pounds of your stuff
item.description: WeRide's unmanned electric delivery van, the Robovan W5, has 194 cubic feet of cargo space and can carry payloads up to about 2,205 pounds
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: February’s IT job market in the US shows mixed signals; unemployment ticks up
item.description: “Sluggish” might be the best word to describe the IT job market after the US Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) published its data for February employment today. The data offered mixed signals for US tech jobs: even though the number of tech roles grew, unemployment rose.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride
item.description: This blog will focus on requirements in the context of the federal government. Sound requirements drive best value pricing and performance for customer agencies The post Driving best value pricing – Let’s go for a ride first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Roger Waldron, Federal News Network

item.title: Lenovo introduces compact, liquid-cooled AI edge server
item.description: Lenovo has announced the ThinkEdge SE100, an entry-level AI inferencing server that’s designed to make edge AI affordable for enterprises as well as small and medium-sized businesses. AI systems are not normally small and compact; they’re big, decked out servers with lots of memory, GPUs, and CPUs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IT execs need to embrace a new role: myth-buster
item.description: One of the most dangerous trends arising from the combination of access to generative AI (genAI) tools, the cloud, and mobile apps is how easy it is for a line-of-business chief to do an end-run around IT and deploy all manner of things.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Alibaba says its new AI model rivals DeepSeeks’s R-1, OpenAI’s o1
item.description: Alibaba Cloud on Thursday launched QwQ-32B, a compact reasoning model built on its latest large language model (LLM), Qwen2.5-32b, one it says delivers performance comparable to other large cutting edge models, including Chinese rival DeepSeek and OpenAI’s o1, with only 32 billion parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: C++ founder champions profiles for memory safety
item.description: C++ memory safety issues have come under heat recently, with rising interest in projects like TrapC and Safe C++ that attempt to tackle the issue. But C++ designer Bjarne Stroustrup remains steadfast in promoting profiles as essential for safety in C++.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Salesforce’s Agentforce 2dx update aims to simplify AI agent development, deployment
item.description: Salesforce on Wednesday released the third version of its agentic AI offering — Agentforce 2dx — to simplify the development, testing, and deployment of AI agents that can automate business processes across departments, such as sales, service, marketing, finance, HR, and operations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Netskope expands SASE footprint, bolsters AI and automation
item.description: Netskope is expanding its global presence by adding multiple regions to its NewEdge carrier-grade infrastructure, which now includes more than 75 locations to ensure processing remains close to end users.
item.dc:creator: Network World
